text:
TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge amount 
(REV_CNTR_TOT_CHRG_AMT) associated with revenue center code (REV_CNTR_CD) '0815' from all 
claim records included in the stay. 

This field is first available in 2016.
